hero.title: Find & Save Your Favorite Movies
hero.subtitle: Discover thousands of movies, save to your personal collection, and track your watchlist.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: All the tools to manage, track, and enjoy your movie collection.

database.title: Complete Database
database.description: Access millions of movies from TMDB and OMDb. Search by title, view synopses, posters, genres, and ratings.

collection.title: Personal Collection
collection.description: Save movies to your collection. Mark them as Watched, Plan to Watch, or Dropped.

stats.title: Interesting Stats
stats.description: View collection summary: total movies, by category, favorite genres, and highest ratings.

more.title: And More
more.description: 1-5 ratings, personal notes, filters and sorting, collection search, and much more.

search.initial: Find movies to add to your collection. Start typing above.
search.noResults: No movies found for "{query}". Check the spelling or try a different title.
search.error: Could not search right now. Please try again.

collection.empty: Your collection is empty. Search movies and start building your watchlist.
collection.noMatch: No movies match "{filter}". Try a different category or genre.
collection.noSearchMatch: No movies matching "{query}" in your collection.
collection.corrupt: Something went wrong loading your collection. You can reset the data and start fresh.

tracker.confirmDelete: Remove "{title}" from your collection? This cannot be undone.

filter.stats: {total} movies · {watched} watched · {plan} plan to watch · {dropped} dropped

errors.apiUnavailable: Can't search right now — TMDB is unavailable. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.fallbackSource: Using alternative source. Search results may vary.
errors.offline: You're offline. Your collection is still accessible.

notFound.message: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.
